Title: Enacts the "utility fair acquisition act"
Summary: Enacts the "utility fair acquisition act", providing that in any acquisition by a municipal corporation or a public benefit corporation created pursuant to article 5 of the public authorities law of infrastructure operated by a public utility company or private energy provider, the appraised value shall be reduced by the value of infrastructure that was financed through customer user fees, ratepayer surcharges, or other non-investor-funded mechanisms as determined by the public service commission.
LawCode: Amd §362, Gen Muni L; add §2859, Pub Auth L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general municipal law and the public authorities law, in relation to enacting the "utility fair acquisition act"
